raw_form_input.scenario_summary: Adult says her 17-year-old niece lives with her most of the week, but custody and tax-dependent status are unclear. It is also unclear whether the teen still has active coverage through another parent.
raw_form_input.language_or_stress_notes: Needs clarification on who counts in the household and whose insurance is active.

household_profile.scenario_summary: Adult says her 17-year-old niece lives with her most of the week, but custody and tax-dependent status are unclear. It is also unclear whether the teen still has active coverage through another parent.

validation_warnings: Insurance status is unknown and may affect Medicaid/CHIP results.
clarification_questions: Please resolve contradictory inputs: num_children/household composition vs dependent status

matched_conditions: Household income 1700 is within the prototype SNAP threshold 2800.
Food hardship or low-income signal supports prescreening relevance.
Children in the household keep income within the prototype Medicaid/CHIP threshold 3600.
caveats: Coverage status is unclear and should be verified during follow-up.
Household-composition contradictions block a firm Medicaid/CHIP read.

matched_conditions: Heating-assistance need is present and income 1700 is within the prototype LIHEAP limit 4200.

failed_conditions: No child under 5 or pregnancy signal was provided.

matched_conditions: The case includes navigation, ambiguity, or local-support signals that warrant a human/community referral.

uncertainty_flags: Missing core fields limit deterministic prescreening.
Unknown insurance status affects Medicaid/CHIP confidence.
priority_rationale: Local Referral ranked with prototype score 145.

Local Referral: Lease or eviction notice if relevant

next_steps: Clarify missing or contradictory intake details before relying on final prescreening.
Gather the listed documents for the highest-priority programs first.
Address heating-bill urgency first if there is a shutoff or overdue balance.
Contact a local navigator, benefits helper, or housing-support organization for follow-up.
Treat this as prescreening only, not an official eligibility determination.
checklist_explanation.user_explanation: Based on the information provided, this household may be a fit for Local Referral, LIHEAP, SNAP, Medicaid/CHIP. Local Referral: The case includes navigation, ambiguity, or local-support signals that warrant a human/community referral. LIHEAP: Heating-assistance need is present and income 1700 is within the prototype LIHEAP limit 4200. SNAP: Household income 1700 is within the prototype SNAP threshold 2800. Medicaid/CHIP: Children in the household keep income within the prototype Medicaid/CHIP threshold 3600. Caveats: Missing core fields limit deterministic prescreening. Contradictory intake data requires follow-up. Unknown insurance status affects Medicaid/CHIP confidence. Coverage status is unclear and should be verified during follow-up. Household-composition contradictions block a firm Medicaid/CHIP read. This is a prescreening and next-step guide, not an official determination.
visible_caveats: Missing core fields limit deterministic prescreening.

referral_notes: A local navigator or caseworker may help resolve ambiguity, local housing issues, or application barriers.
